description: Small electrical contracting firm based in Karatina, Kenya. EPRA licensed Class C-2 electrical contractor.

Kenyan electrical engineering company established in 1998, specializing in electrical installations, generator installation and maintenance, ICT infrastructure development, and structure cabling. EPRA Class A-1 rated contractor.
Electrical contracting services based in Lamu, Kenya. EPRA Class B licensed contractor.
Small electrical contracting firm based in Nakuru, Kenya. EPRA Class C-2 licensed contractor.
Electrical contracting firm based in Kisii, Kenya. Has a Facebook presence. EPRA Class B licensed contractor.
Small electrical contracting firm based in Nairobi, Kenya. Listed in EPRA register of licensed electrical contractors.

NCA-1 and EPRA Class A1 rated electrical contractor specializing in electrical installation for residential, commercial, hotels, hospitals, and government installations. Constructs small, medium, and large-scale electrical sub-stations across Kenya and Africa.
Electrical contracting firm based in Nairobi, Kenya. Listed in EPRA register of licensed electrical contractors.
Electrical contracting firm based in Kisumu, Kenya. Also registered with the County Government of Kisumu for prequalification. EPRA Class B licensed contractor.

East Africa's leading Electrical and ICT Contractor headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya. Provides a wide range of electrical contracting services to industrial, commercial, and institutional clients across the continent. Notable projects include Kengen Olkaria power stations, NSSF Uganda, and various corporate clients.

Central Electricals International Limited (CEIL) is a leading international electrical contracting company established in 1951. Headquartered in Nairobi with branches in Mombasa, Dar-es-Salaam, Zanzibar, Kampala, Kigali, South Sudan, Zambia, and Malawi. 1,163+ LinkedIn followers.

Kenyan electrical contracting company with over 25 years experience offering complete solutions including electrical installations, repairs compliance, data cabling, audio visual installations, and renewable energy solutions. Notable clients include Government of Kenya, Kenya Revenue Authority, and Stanbic Bank.

Renowned electrical contractor and engineers in Kenya, established in 1950. Located at MJV Building, Butere Rd, Nairobi. Services include wholesale of machinery, electrical installation, and electronic stores.

The leading supplier of water-related equipment in East Africa, founded in 1946. Seven principal product sectors: water pumps, boreholes, swimming pools, water treatment, generators, solar energy (panels, batteries, lithium), and irrigation. Fully Kenyan-owned and headquartered in Nairobi Industrial Area. Major presence across Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, Zambia, Rwanda, Ghana, Zimbabwe, South Sudan, Ethiopia, and Burundi.

raw_notes: African branch of Eft-Systems Gmbh. Established in Kenya in July 2021, aims to introduce BYD technology in the sub-Saharan market by developing local after-sales service.
description: Leading distributor of lithium-ion batteries in Africa. African branch of Eft-Systems GmbH, established in Kenya in July 2021. Responsible for bringing the BYD Battery-Box product range from Kenya to the sub-Saharan market. Provides specialized BYD lithium-ion training, product inventory, and after-sales support. Operations in Kenya, Uganda, and South Africa.

raw_notes: Mission is to make solar energy accessible to everyone. Self-described as the Best Solar Company in Kenya. Empowering a global lifestyle with a brighter and greener tomorrow.
description: Solaire Kenya is a technology company part of Solaire India (Lagnuvo initiative) with over 25 years of experience. Specializes in innovative power solutions including solar panels (100W-600W), hybrid inverters (850VA-10Kva), high-frequency inverters (4KW-15KW), and battery systems. Located at Vision Plaza, Mombasa Road, Nairobi.

raw_notes: Leading solar energy company dedicated to making a positive impact. Story began with a deep-rooted desire to give back to homeland and create a brighter future for generations to come.
description: Teravon Green Energies Limited is an experienced Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) company offering comprehensive solar energy services including ground-mounted solar parks and industrial rooftop solar projects. Originated from India with operations expanding to Kenya and Africa.

Parent company of Solaire Kenya. Delivers high-quality power solutions on a global scale with a mission to make solar energy accessible to everyone. Participated in Kenya Clean Energy Week 2026. Active in solar panel and inverter distribution across Kenya.

raw_notes: Leading renewable energy company dedicated to providing reliable, affordable, and sustainable solar power solutions across Kenya and the East African region. Specializes in design, supply, installation, and maintenance of high-quality solar systems.
description: Geo Solarworks Technology Ltd specializes in solar energy solutions across Eastern Africa with over 10 megawatts installed in Kenya. Offers solar panels, inverters, and batteries for residential, small commercial, and large government clients. Integrates technologies across the entire solar value chain to maximize customer investment value.

raw_notes: Specializes in smart, secure, and energy-efficient automation for homes and businesses.
description: Leading provider of cutting-edge smart home technology in East Africa. Based in Nairobi, specializes in designing and integrating intelligent automation systems that enhance security, efficiency, and energy management for homes and businesses. Offers state-of-the-art automation solutions tailored to client needs.
